Notes: UCA plays winner of Ark. Tech/UNA at 1 p.m. CT on Sunday
Hillary Ross sets new LMU career rebound record, Passing Lori Neely (1985-89)
Game.Officials: Ron Harris,  Ernest Jones,  Bill Hudson
